title: peltospermum latisiliquum
intro: Peltospermum latisiliquum is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the family Rutaceae and commonly known as the Tasmanian peltospermum or the Australian orange bush. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Peltospermum latisiliquum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
